description.zh: 訓練背部與手臂肌肉，適合初學者建立上背力量
description.en: Trains back and arm muscles, great for beginners building upper back strength

steps.zh: 調整座墊高度，使大腿貼合固定墊
steps.en: Adjust the seat pad so your thighs fit snugly under the pad

steps.zh: 站立抓住橫桿後坐下，雙手握距略寬於肩
steps.en: Stand, grab the bar slightly wider than shoulder-width, then sit down

steps.zh: 選擇重量：初學者建議從體重的 30–40% 開始
steps.en: Choose weight: beginners should start at 30–40% of body weight

steps.zh: 背部挺直，將橫桿向胸口方向下拉，感受背部用力
steps.en: Keep back straight, pull the bar down toward your chest, feel your back engage

steps.zh: 緩慢控制讓橫桿回到起始位置
steps.en: Slowly let the bar return to the starting position under control

mistakes.zh: 不要用甩動身體的方式借力拉下橫桿
mistakes.en: Don't swing your body to pull the bar down

mistakes.zh: 不要讓重量快速彈回，保持全程控制
mistakes.en: Don't let the weight snap back — control the return

warning.zh: 若感到肩膀或手肘疼痛請立即停止，重量過重是常見原因
warning.en: Stop immediately if you feel shoulder or elbow pain — weight is likely too heavy

description.zh: 訓練背部中段與手臂，幫助改善坐姿與體態
description.en: Trains mid-back and arms, helps improve posture

steps.zh: 坐在座墊上，雙腳踩在腳踏板，膝蓋微彎
steps.en: Sit on the pad, place feet on the platform with a slight knee bend

steps.zh: 身體微微前傾抓住握把，背部打直
steps.en: Lean slightly forward to grab the handle, keep your back straight

steps.zh: 選擇重量：初學者建議 10–20 公斤開始
steps.en: Choose weight: beginners start with 10–20 kg

steps.zh: 將握把向肚臍方向拉，手肘靠近身體兩側
steps.en: Pull the handle toward your navel, keep elbows close to your sides

steps.zh: 緩慢回到起始位置，感受背部伸展
steps.en: Slowly return to start and feel the stretch in your back

mistakes.zh: 不要用甩動背部借力，動作要穩定
mistakes.en: Don't rock your back to pull the weight — keep movement controlled

mistakes.zh: 不要聳肩，保持肩膀向下放鬆
mistakes.en: Don't shrug your shoulders — keep them down and relaxed

warning.zh: 若下背感到不適，請檢查是否過度前傾或重量過重
warning.en: If your lower back hurts, check if you're leaning too far forward or the weight is too heavy

description.zh: 訓練腹部核心肌群，增強腰腹力量
description.en: Trains core abdominal muscles and strengthens the midsection

steps.zh: 調整椅背角度：初學者建議接近水平或稍微傾斜
steps.en: Set the backrest angle: beginners should start near flat or slightly inclined

steps.zh: 坐上後雙腳勾住腳墊，固定下半身
steps.en: Sit and hook your feet under the foot pad to secure your lower body

steps.zh: 雙手交叉放在胸前或輕扶耳側（不要拉頭）
steps.en: Cross arms over chest or lightly place hands beside your head (don't pull your head)

steps.zh: 緩慢向後躺下，再用腹部力量坐起
steps.en: Slowly lean back, then use your abs to sit back up

steps.zh: 不需要完全躺平，到腹部感到緊繃即可回來
steps.en: You don't need to lie fully flat — return when you feel your abs fully contract

mistakes.zh: 不要用脖子或手臂拉力，專注腹部收縮
mistakes.en: Don't pull with your neck or arms — focus on contracting your abs

mistakes.zh: 不要動作過快，慢速才能有效訓練腹肌
mistakes.en: Don't rush — slow movement is more effective for training abs

warning.zh: 若有下背疼痛問題，請先諮詢醫生再使用此器材
warning.en: If you have lower back issues, consult a doctor before using this equipment

description.zh: 訓練大腿與臀部肌肉，適合初學者安全練腿
description.en: Trains thighs and glutes — a safe beginner-friendly leg exercise

steps.zh: 調整座椅距離，使膝蓋彎曲約 90 度
steps.en: Adjust the seat so your knees bend to about 90 degrees

steps.zh: 雙腳平放在踏板中央，與肩同寬
steps.en: Place feet flat on the platform, shoulder-width apart

steps.zh: 選擇重量：初學者建議從 20–30 公斤開始
steps.en: Choose weight: beginners start with 20–30 kg

steps.zh: 推開踏板時扳開安全把手，雙手握住兩側扶把
steps.en: Push the platform and release the safety handle, grip the side handles

steps.zh: 緩慢彎曲膝蓋讓踏板靠近，再推出去，腳跟保持貼穩
steps.en: Slowly bend knees to lower the platform, then push out — keep heels flat

mistakes.zh: 不要讓膝蓋向內夾，保持與腳趾同方向
mistakes.en: Don't let knees cave inward — keep them aligned with your toes

mistakes.zh: 不要在最高點鎖死膝蓋，保留微彎保護關節
mistakes.en: Don't lock your knees at the top — keep a slight bend to protect your joints

warning.zh: 使用完畢請記得重新鎖上安全把手，避免踏板滑落
warning.en: Always re-engage the safety lock after use to prevent the platform from dropping

description.zh: 訓練胸部、肩膀與手臂，初學者友善的推胸動作
description.en: Trains chest, shoulders and arms — beginner-friendly chest exercise

steps.zh: 調整座椅高度，使握把與胸口齊平
steps.en: Adjust seat height so the handles are level with your chest

steps.zh: 背部完全貼合椅背，雙腳平放地面
steps.en: Press your back fully against the seat back, feet flat on the floor

steps.zh: 選擇重量：初學者建議從 10–15 公斤開始
steps.en: Choose weight: beginners start with 10–15 kg

steps.zh: 雙手握住握把，向前推出直到手臂幾乎打直
steps.en: Grip the handles and push forward until arms are nearly straight

steps.zh: 緩慢彎曲手肘回到起始位置，感受胸部伸展
steps.en: Slowly bend elbows back to the start position and feel your chest stretch

mistakes.zh: 不要讓背部離開椅背借力推更重
mistakes.en: Don't arch your back off the seat to push more weight

mistakes.zh: 不要完全鎖死手肘，保留微彎保護關節
mistakes.en: Don't fully lock your elbows — keep a slight bend to protect your joints

warning.zh: 若感到肩膀夾痛，請降低重量或重新調整座椅高度
warning.en: If you feel shoulder impingement pain, reduce the weight or re-adjust the seat height
